message:
fix(ui): Correct padding calculation in import welcome box

The right border was misaligned because the padding formula subtracted 2
instead of 1. The box structure is:
  │ {text}{padding}│

With inner=46, we need: 1 (│) + 1 (space) + text + padding + 1 (│) = 48
So padding = inner - visible_len - 1, not - 2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
